title: Billing Worker Connection Refused
description: billing-worker returning CONNECTION_REFUSED errors after the v1.19.1 deploy. Error rate climbed to 11.1% under load; upstream calls from search-api began failing shortly after. Region: prod-us-east-1.
resolution: Rolled back billing-worker to the previous stable version. Patched the affected component with a targeted fix. Re-deployed after regression coverage was added for the failure path. Validated p95 latency and 5xx rate returned to baseline.
rca_summary: circuit breaker mis-tuned, opening on transient failures. The failure mode was connection refused, surfaced first by the search-api upstream. Resolved by rollback + targeted regression coverage.

title: Notification Svc Timeout
description: notification-svc hit timeout during business hours. Customer impact reported.
resolution: Bumped resources and moved on.
rca_summary: downstream timeout

title: Search Api Jwt Expired
description: search-api returning JWT_EXPIRED errors after the v1.17.6 deploy. Error rate climbed to 2.4% under load; upstream calls from session-cache began failing shortly after. Region: staging.
resolution: Rolled back search-api to the previous stable version. Patched the affected component with a targeted fix. Re-deployed after regression coverage was added for the failure path. Validated p95 latency and 5xx rate returned to baseline.
rca_summary: DB connection pool exhausted before autoscaling kicked in. The failure mode was jwt expired, surfaced first by the session-cache upstream. Resolved by rollback + targeted regression coverage.

title: Search Api Cert Expired
description: search-api returning CERT_EXPIRED errors after the v1.13.1 deploy. Error rate climbed to 7.5% under load; upstream calls from session-cache began failing shortly after. Region: prod-eu-west-1.
resolution: Rolled back search-api to the previous stable version. Patched the affected component with a targeted fix. Re-deployed after regression coverage was added for the failure path. Validated p95 latency and 5xx rate returned to baseline.
rca_summary: downstream timeout was too tight for the new payload size. The failure mode was cert expired, surfaced first by the session-cache upstream. Resolved by rollback + targeted regression coverage.
